3325490.name: Mighty Miners
3325490.description:
Crash-landed on a mysterious planet rich with Mightium - the most powerful energy source in the galaxy - the Mighty Miners must dig, blast, and upgrade their way to survival. But they’re not alone. The villainous Star Pirates have also arrived, and they’ll stop at nothing to steal every last ounce for themselves.

Based on the fictional 1987 animated series Mighty Miners, this action-packed game adaptation puts you in control of both the heroes and the villains in a chaotic race to harvest resources, complete tasks, and unlock unstoppable power.

Gameplay

Each run you mine resources and survive as long as possible while keeping an eye out for mysterious items, hidden stashes and ways to refill your slowly draining energy meter.

Between runs, spend your earnings, complete tasks, purchase permanent upgrades and unlock new levels of power that simple words can't do justice.

Features

  • Satisfying mining action, powered by automated weaponry and simple controls

  • Unlock weapons, items, upgrades, characters, systems, stages and more in a cascade of things to put in your collection

  • Upgrade and gain immense permanent power through different meta systems

  • Plenty of tasks to complete with juicy rewards

  • Explore multiple semi-randomized levels

  • Multiple screen shake settings, wow

  • Some kind of fungus
